message.content:
Read `./.claude/progress.txt`, pick the most important pending task, execute it, update the file, commit, and stop.

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Do NOT change logic, only migrate structure
- The source of truth is card-place, consult it only if in doubt
- The code has already been copied to this repository
- Everything must be migrated to the new architecture/Style Guide (./.claude/STYLE_GUIDE.md)

WORKFLOW:
1. Read progress.txt and identify the next pending task
2. If NO pending tasks exist, output exactly: <promise>FINISHED</promise> and stop
3. If there is a task:
   a. Update task status to "in progress" in progress.txt
   b. Execute migration following STYLE_GUIDE.md
   c. Launch a review agent (Task tool with subagent_type=Explore) to verify the work
   d. Review output and consider improvements
   e. Implement corrections if needed
   f. Update progress.txt marking task as completed
   g. Commit changes
   h. Stop

CRITICAL: If all tasks are completed, you MUST output: <promise>FINISHED</promise>

content.text: I'll start by reading the progress.txt file to identify the next pending task.

content.content:
1â†’# Reward Program - Redux to Zustand Migration
     2â†’
     3â†’Last Updated: 2026-01-26 21:30
     4â†’Status: INCOMPLETE - SCREEN MIGRATION PENDING
     5â†’
     6â†’================================================================================
     7â†’CRITICAL: PREVIOUS SESSION ERRORS TO AVOID
     8â†’================================================================================
     9â†’
    10â†’1. INFRASTRUCTURE WAS CREATED BUT SCREENS WERE NOT MIGRATED
    11â†’   - Zustand stores exist but screens still use Redux connect()
    12â†’   - useRescue hook was created but NEVER integrated into screens
    13â†’   - This made the migration USELESS - data flows through Redux, not Zustand
    14â†’
    15â†’2. TYPES WERE DUPLICATED UNNECESSARILY
    16â†’   - PointsProduct already exists in services/models/products.model.ts
    17â†’   - Do NOT add duplicate types - check if they exist first
    18â†’
    19â†’3. BALANCE LOCATION WAS CONFUSED
    20â†’   - Balance is in `pointsBalance` within extract.store.ts
    21â†’   - NOT in parameter.store.ts
    22â†’   - The getPointsBalance() service exists in extract.service.ts
    23â†’
    24â†’4. PRODUCTION PATTERN WAS NOT FOLLOWED
    25â†’   - Production (card-place) calls services DIRECTLY, not always through hooks
    26â†’   - Example: getParameterPointsProgram() is called directly in Points screen
    27â†’
    28â†’5. usePermission USES SuperApp's Redux (customerReducer.nrc)
    29â†’   - This is NOT local Redux to migrate
    30â†’   - Production also uses useSelector for this
    31â†’   - Keep as-is until SuperApp migrates customer data to Zustand
    32â†’
    33â†’================================================================================
    34â†’CURRENT STATE (VERIFIED 2026-01-26)
    35â†’================================================================================
    36â†’
    37â†’## Zustand Infrastructure: COMPLETE
    38â†’
    39â†’| Domain       | Store | API | Model | Repository | Service | Hook   |
    40â†’|--------------|-------|-----|-------|------------|---------|--------|
    41â†’| airlineMiles | âœ…    | âœ…  | âœ…    | -          | âœ…      | âœ…     |
    42â†’| extract      | âœ…    | âœ…  | âœ…    | âœ…         | âœ…      | -      |
    43â†’| parameter    | âœ…    | âœ…  | âœ…    | âœ…         | âœ…      | -      |
    44â†’| permission   | âœ…    | âœ…  | âœ…    | âœ…         | âœ…      | âœ…     |
    45â†’| products     | âœ…    | âœ…  | âœ…    | âœ…         | âœ…      | -      |
    46â†’| rescue       | âœ…    | âœ…  | âœ…    | -          | âœ…      | âœ… (1) |
    47â†’| marketplace  | âœ…    | âœ…  | âœ…    | -          | âœ…      | -      |
    48â†’
    49â†’(1) useRescue exists but is NEVER USED by any screen
    50â†’
    51â†’## Hooks Status:
    52â†’- src/services/hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts - âœ… Used by AirlineMilesMarketplace
    53â†’- src/services/hooks/usePermission.ts - âœ… Used by InvoiceCashbackSummary
    54â†’- src/services/hooks/useRescue.ts - â‌Œ EXISTS BUT UNUSED
    55â†’- src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts - â‌Œ DOES NOT EXIST (MUST CREATE)
    56â†’- src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts - â‌Œ DOES NOT EXIST (MUST CREATE)
    57â†’
    58â†’## Screens Status:
    59â†’
    60â†’| Screen                    | Uses Redux? | Uses Zustand? | Migration Status |
    61â†’|---------------------------|-------------|---------------|------------------|
    62â†’| AirlineMilesMarketplace   | No          | Yes           | âœ… DONE          |
    63â†’| ExtractRewardProgram      | No          | Yes           | âœ… DONE          |
    64â†’| LearnMoreRewardProgram    | No          | Yes           | âœ… DONE          |
    65â†’| MyOrdersRewardProgram     | No          | Yes           | âœ… DONE          |
    66â†’| Points                    | YES         | Partial (2)   | â‌Œ PENDING       |
    67â†’| PointsDetail              | YES (3)     | No            | â‌Œ PENDING       |
    68â†’| RewardProgramMarketplace  | YES         | No            | â‌Œ PENDING       |
    69â†’| InvoiceCashbackOnboarding | YES         | No            | â‌Œ PENDING       |
    70â†’| InvoiceCashbackPoints     | YES         | No            | â‌Œ PENDING       |
    71â†’| InvoiceCashbackSummary    | YES         | Partial (4)   | â‌Œ PENDING       |
    72â†’
    73â†’(2) Points calls getParameterPointsProgram() directly (Zustand service)
    74â†’(3) PointsDetail has connect() but NEVER uses the state - dead code
    75â†’(4) InvoiceCashbackSummary uses usePermission (Zustand) but rescueActions (Redux)
    76â†’
    77â†’## Redux Files That MUST BE DELETED (after screen migration):
    78â†’
    79â†’- src/redux/ducks/points.ts
    80â†’- src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
    81â†’- src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
    82â†’- src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
    83â†’- src/redux/reducers/index.ts
    84â†’- src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts (only contains ParametrizationData type)
    85â†’
    86â†’## Missing Types in Zustand Models:
    87â†’
    88â†’- FilterOption - exists in redux/ducks/points.ts:63-66, NOT in services/models
    89â†’
    90â†’================================================================================
    91â†’STATE MAPPING: Redux â†’ Zustand
    92â†’================================================================================
    93â†’
    94â†’## pointsReducer (Redux) â†’ Multiple Zustand stores
    95â†’
    96â†’| Redux Field                    | Zustand Location                              | Service Function           |
    97â†’|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|----------------------------|
    98â†’| points                         | pointsBalance.points (extract store)          | getPointsBalance()         |
    99â†’| isLoadingBalance               | pointsBalance.status === LOADING              | -                          |
   100â†’| isErrorBalance                 | pointsBalance.status === ERROR                | -                          |
   101â†’| products                       | pointsProducts.products (products store)      | getPointsProducts()        |
   102â†’| isLoadingProducts              | pointsProducts.status === LOADING             | -                          |
   103â†’| isErrorProducts                | pointsProducts.status === ERROR               | -                          |
   104â†’| pointsQuantity                 | parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity         | getParameterPointsProgram()|
   105â†’| conversionFactor               | parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor       | -                          |
   106â†’| isLoadingParameterization      | parameterPointsProgram.status === LOADING     | -                          |
   107â†’| isErrorParameterization        | parameterPointsProgram.status === ERROR       | -                          |
   108â†’| appliedTransactionsFilters     | pointsExtractFilters.appliedTransactionsFilters | -                        |
   109â†’| appliedExpiringFilters         | pointsExtractFilters.appliedExpiringFilters   | -                          |
   110â†’
   111â†’## rescueReducer (Redux) â†’ rescue store (Zustand)
   112â†’
   113â†’| Redux Field | Zustand Location            | Service Function |
   114â†’|-------------|-----------------------------|------------------|
   115â†’| isLoading   | rescue.status === LOADING   | performRescue()  |
   116â†’| isError     | rescue.status === ERROR     | -                |
   117â†’| status      | rescue.responseStatus       | -                |
   118â†’
   119â†’## getMarketplaceReducer (Redux) â†’ marketplace store (Zustand)
   120â†’
   121â†’| Redux Field | Zustand Location              | Service Function  |
   122â†’|-------------|-------------------------------|-------------------|
   123â†’| isLoading   | marketplace.status === LOADING| getMarketplace()  |
   124â†’| isError     | marketplace.status === ERROR  | -                 |
   125â†’| data        | marketplace.data              | -                 |
   126â†’
   127â†’================================================================================
   128â†’TASKS TO COMPLETE MIGRATION
   129â†’================================================================================
   130â†’
   131â†’## Phase 1: Add Missing Type [QUICK FIX]
   132â†’
   133â†’### 1.1 Add FilterOption to products.model.ts
   134â†’File: src/services/models/products.model.ts
   135â†’
   136â†’Add at end of file:
   137â†’```typescript
   138â†’export interface FilterOption {
   139â†’  value: string | number;
   140â†’  label: string;
   141â†’}
   142â†’```
   143â†’
   144â†’### 1.2 Export FilterOption from models/index.ts
   145â†’File: src/services/models/index.ts
   146â†’
   147â†’Add: export { FilterOption } from './products.model';
   148â†’
   149â†’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   150â†’
   151â†’## Phase 2: Create usePoints Hook [CRITICAL]
   152â†’
   153â†’### 2.1 Create src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts
   154â†’
   155â†’This hook REPLACES all pointsReducer + PointsActions usage.
   156â†’
   157â†’```typescript
   158â†’import { useCallback } from 'react';
   159â†’import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
   160â†’import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
   161â†’import {
   162â†’  getPointsProducts,
   163â†’  clearPointsProducts,
   164â†’  getPointsBalance,
   165â†’  getParameterPointsProgram,
   166â†’} from '../services';
   167â†’import {
   168â†’  PointsProductsStatus,
   169â†’  PointsBalanceStatus,
   170â†’  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
   171â†’} from '../models';
   172â†’
   173â†’export function usePoints() {
   174â†’  // Products from products store
   175â†’  const pointsProducts = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsProducts));
   176â†’  const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();
   177â†’
   178â†’  // Balance from extract store (pointsBalance)
   179â†’  const pointsBalance = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsBalance));
   180â†’
   181â†’  // Parameterization from parameter store
   182â†’  const parameterPointsProgram = useRootStore(
   183â†’    useShallow((state) => state.parameterPointsProgram)
   184â†’  );
   185â†’
   186â†’  const requestInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
   187â†’    await Promise.all([
   188â†’      getPointsBalance(),
   189â†’      getPointsProducts(),
   190â†’      getParameterPointsProgram(),
   191â†’    ]);
   192â†’  }, []);
   193â†’
   194â†’  const requestPointsBalance = useCallback(async () => {
   195â†’    await getPointsBalance();
   196â†’  }, []);
   197â†’
   198â†’  const requestPointsProducts = useCallback(async () => {
   199â†’    await getPointsProducts();
   200â†’  }, []);
   201â†’
   202â†’  const requestParameterization = useCallback(async () => {
   203â†’    await getParameterPointsProgram();
   204â†’  }, []);
   205â†’
   206â†’  const clear = useCallback(() => {
   207â†’    clearPointsProducts();
   208â†’  }, []);
   209â†’
   210â†’  return {
   211â†’    // Balance (from extract store - pointsBalance)
   212â†’    points: pointsBalance.points,
   213â†’    isLoadingBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING,
   214â†’    isErrorBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR,
   215â†’
   216â†’    // Products (from products store)
   217â†’    products: pointsProducts.products,
   218â†’    isLoadingProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.LOADING,
   219â†’    isErrorProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.ERROR,
   220â†’
   221â†’    // Parameterization (from parameter store)
   222â†’    pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity,
   223â†’    conversionFactor: parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor,
   224â†’    isLoadingParameterization:
   225â†’      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
   226â†’    isErrorParameterization:
   227â†’      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR,
   228â†’
   229â†’    // Actions
   230â†’    requestPointsBalance,
   231â†’    requestPointsProducts,
   232â†’    requestParameterization,
   233â†’    requestInitialData,
   234â†’    clear,
   235â†’  };
   236â†’}
   237â†’```
   238â†’
   239â†’### 2.2 Verify ParameterPointsProgramStatus exists
   240â†’File: src/services/models/parameter.model.ts
   241â†’
   242â†’Should have:
   243â†’```typescript
   244â†’export enum ParameterPointsProgramStatus {
   245â†’  IDLE = 'idle',
   246â†’  LOADING = 'loading',
   247â†’  SUCCESS = 'success',
   248â†’  ERROR = 'error',
   249â†’}
   250â†’```
   251â†’
   252â†’If missing, add it.
   253â†’
   254â†’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   255â†’
   256â†’## Phase 3: Create useMarketplace Hook [CRITICAL]
   257â†’
   258â†’### 3.1 Create src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts
   259â†’
   260â†’```typescript
   261â†’import { useCallback } from 'react';
   262â†’import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
   263â†’import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
   264â†’import { getMarketplace, clearMarketplace } from '../services';
   265â†’import { MarketplaceStatus } from '../models';
   266â†’
   267â†’export function useMarketplace() {
   268â†’  const marketplace = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.marketplace));
   269â†’
   270â†’  const requestGetMarketplace = useCallback(
   271â†’    async (params: Record<string, string>) => {
   272â†’      await getMarketplace(params);
   273â†’    },
   274â†’    []
   275â†’  );
   276â†’
   277â†’  const clear = useCallback(() => {
   278â†’    clearMarketplace();
   279â†’  }, []);
   280â†’
   281â†’  return {
   282â†’    data: marketplace.data,
   283â†’    isLoading: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.LOADING,
   284â†’    isError: marketplace.status === MarketplaceStatus.ERROR,
   285â†’    requestGetMarketplace,
   286â†’    clear,
   287â†’  };
   288â†’}
   289â†’```
   290â†’
   291â†’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   292â†’
   293â†’## Phase 4: Update hooks/index.ts Exports
   294â†’
   295â†’### 4.1 Add new hook exports
   296â†’File: src/services/hooks/index.ts
   297â†’
   298â†’```typescript
   299â†’export * from './usePermission';
   300â†’export * from './useAirlineMiles';
   301â†’export * from './useRescue';
   302â†’export * from './usePoints';      // ADD
   303â†’export * from './useMarketplace'; // ADD
   304â†’```
   305â†’
   306â†’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   307â†’
   308â†’## Phase 5: Migrate Screens [CRITICAL - MAIN TASK]
   309â†’
   310â†’### 5.1 Points Screen
   311â†’File: src/screens/Points/index.tsx
   312â†’
   313â†’REMOVE:
   314â†’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   315â†’- import { Dispatch, bindActionCreators } from 'redux';
   316â†’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   317â†’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   318â†’- mapStateToProps function
   319â†’- mapDispatchToProps function
   320â†’- connect() wrapper at export
   321â†’
   322â†’ADD:
   323â†’- import { usePoints } from '../../services';
   324â†’
   325â†’REPLACE component props with hook:
   326â†’```typescript
   327â†’const Points: FC<PointsProps> = ({ navigation }) => {
   328â†’  const {
   329â†’    points,
   330â†’    products,
   331â†’    isLoadingBalance,
   332â†’    isErrorBalance,
   333â†’    isErrorProducts,
   334â†’    requestInitialData,
   335â†’    requestPointsBalance,
   336â†’    requestPointsProducts,
   337â†’    clear,
   338â†’  } = usePoints();
   339â†’
   340â†’  // Replace pointsReducer.X with hook values:
   341â†’  // pointsReducer.points â†’ points
   342â†’  // pointsReducer.products â†’ products
   343â†’  // pointsReducer.isLoadingBalance â†’ isLoadingBalance
   344â†’  // pointsReducer.isErrorBalance â†’ isErrorBalance
   345â†’  // pointsReducer.isErrorProducts â†’ isErrorProducts
   346â†’
   347â†’  // Keep getParameterPointsProgram() call as-is (direct service call)
   348â†’
   349â†’  // useEffect cleanup: clear() stays the same
   350â†’```
   351â†’
   352â†’Export: `export default Points;` (no connect wrapper)
   353â†’
   354â†’### 5.2 PointsDetail Screen
   355â†’File: src/screens/PointsDetail/index.tsx
   356â†’
   357â†’This screen has connect() but NEVER uses pointsReducer state.
   358â†’Simply REMOVE all Redux code:
   359â†’
   360â†’REMOVE:
   361â†’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   362â†’- import { Dispatch, bindActionCreators } from 'redux';
   363â†’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   364â†’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   365â†’- mapStateToProps function
   366â†’- mapDispatchToProps function
   367â†’- connect() wrapper
   368â†’- fintechPointsReducer prop (unused)
   369â†’
   370â†’Export: `export default PointsDetail;`
   371â†’
   372â†’### 5.3 RewardProgramMarketplace Screen
   373â†’File: src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/index.tsx
   374â†’
   375â†’REMOVE:
   376â†’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   377â†’- import { getMarketplaceActions } from '../../redux/ducks/getMarketplace';
   378â†’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   379â†’- mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps, connect()
   380â†’
   381â†’ADD:
   382â†’- import { useMarketplace } from '../../services';
   383â†’
   384â†’REPLACE:
   385â†’```typescript
   386â†’const RewardProgramMarketplace: FC<Props> = ({ navigation }) => {
   387â†’  const {
   388â†’    data,
   389â†’    isLoading,
   390â†’    isError,
   391â†’    requestGetMarketplace,
   392â†’    clear,
   393â†’  } = useMarketplace();
   394â†’
   395â†’  // Replace getMarketplaceReducer.X with hook values
   396â†’  // getMarketplaceReducer.isLoading â†’ isLoading
   397â†’  // getMarketplaceReducer.isError â†’ isError
   398â†’  // getMarketplaceReducer.data â†’ data
   399â†’```
   400â†’
   401â†’### 5.4 InvoiceCashbackOnboarding Screen
   402â†’File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx
   403â†’
   404â†’REMOVE:
   405â†’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   406â†’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   407â†’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   408â†’- mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps, connect()
   409â†’
   410â†’ADD:

   412â†’
   413â†’REPLACE:
   414â†’```typescript

   416â†’  const {
   417â†’    points,

   419â†’    isLoadingBalance,

   422â†’    requestParameterization,

   425â†’
   426â†’  // Replace pointsReducer.X with hook values
   427â†’```
   428â†’
   429â†’### 5.5 InvoiceCashbackPoints Screen
   430â†’File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
   431â†’
   432â†’REMOVE:
   433â†’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';
   434â†’- import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   435â†’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   436â†’- mapStateToProps, mapDispatchToProps, connect()

   440â†’
   441â†’REPLACE:

   453â†’
   454â†’### 5.6 InvoiceCashbackSummary Screen
   455â†’File: src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
   456â†’
   457â†’REMOVE:
   458â†’- import { connect } from 'react-redux';

   463â†’

   466â†’- import type { RescuePayload } from '../../services';
   467â†’
   468â†’REPLACE:
   469â†’```typescript
   470â†’const InvoiceCashbackSummary: FC<Props> = ({ route }) => {
   471â†’  const { conversionFactor } = usePoints();
   472â†’  const {
   473â†’    isLoading: isRescueLoading,
   474â†’    isError: isRescueFailed,
   475â†’    status: rescueStatus,
   476â†’    rescueRequest,
   477â†’    reset: rescueClear,
   478â†’  } = useRescue();
   479â†’
   480â†’  // Note: isRescueConcluded logic needs adjustment:
   481â†’  // OLD: !isRescueFailed && !!rescueReducer?.status
   482â†’  // NEW: !isRescueFailed && !!rescueStatus
   483â†’
   484â†’  // Replace rescueRequest({ payload }) with rescueRequest(payload)
   485â†’  // The useRescue hook signature is: rescueRequest(payload, callbacks?)
   486â†’```
   487â†’
   488â†’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   489â†’
   490â†’## Phase 6: Update Dependent Files
   491â†’
   492â†’### 6.1 Update type imports in hooks
   493â†’Files that import from redux/ducks:
   494â†’
   495â†’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/index.ts
   496â†’  Change: import { PointsProduct } from '../../../services/models';
   497â†’
   498â†’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/data/index.ts
   499â†’  Change: import { PointsProduct } from '../../../../services/models';
   500â†’
   501â†’### 6.2 Update type imports in routes
   502â†’File: src/routes/Models/index.ts
   503â†’
   504â†’REMOVE:
   505â†’- import { Dispatch } from 'redux';
   506â†’- import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';
   507â†’- import { PointsTransaction } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
   508â†’
   509â†’ADD:
   510â†’- import { PointsTransaction } from '../../services/models';
   511â†’
   512â†’Update any types that reference AppReducers or Dispatch.
   513â†’
   514â†’### 6.3 Update type imports in screens
   515â†’File: src/screens/Points/Models/index.ts
   516â†’
   517â†’REMOVE imports from redux/ducks, ADD from services/models.
   518â†’
   519â†’### 6.4 Update atomic components
   520â†’File: src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx
   521â†’
   522â†’If imports FilterOption from redux:
   523â†’Change: import { FilterOption } from '../../../services/models';
   524â†’
   525â†’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   526â†’
   527â†’## Phase 7: Delete Redux Files [ONLY AFTER SCREENS WORK]
   528â†’
   529â†’### 7.1 Delete Redux ducks
   530â†’- DELETE: src/redux/ducks/points.ts
   531â†’- DELETE: src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
   532â†’- DELETE: src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
   533â†’
   534â†’### 7.2 Delete Redux reducers
   535â†’- DELETE: src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
   536â†’- DELETE: src/redux/reducers/index.ts
   537â†’
   538â†’### 7.3 Delete Redux sagas
   539â†’- DELETE: src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts
   540â†’
   541â†’### 7.4 Check for empty folders
   542â†’- DELETE: src/redux/ folder if completely empty
   543â†’
   544â†’--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   545â†’
   546â†’## Phase 8: Verification
   547â†’
   548â†’### 8.1 TypeScript validation
   549â†’```bash
   550â†’npm run typecheck
   551â†’```
   552â†’Expected: Zero errors in migrated files
   553â†’
   554â†’### 8.2 Knip validation
   555â†’```bash
   556â†’npm run knip
   557â†’```
   558â†’Expected:
   559â†’- No unused exports in services/hooks/
   560â†’- No unresolved imports to redux/
   561â†’- useRescue should now be USED (not unused)
   562â†’
   563â†’### 8.3 Grep validation
   564â†’```bash
   565â†’grep -r "from 'react-redux'" src/screens/
   566â†’grep -r "from '../../redux" src/
   567â†’grep -r "connect(" src/screens/
   568â†’```
   569â†’Expected: No matches (except usePermission which uses SuperApp's Redux)
   570â†’
   571â†’### 8.4 Functional testing
   572â†’- [ ] Points screen loads and displays products
   573â†’- [ ] Points screen shows balance
   574â†’- [ ] PointsDetail screen works (navigation only)
   575â†’- [ ] RewardProgramMarketplace loads redirect URL
   576â†’- [ ] InvoiceCashbackOnboarding displays conversion info
   577â†’- [ ] InvoiceCashbackPoints allows point input
   578â†’- [ ] InvoiceCashbackSummary rescue flow completes
   579â†’- [ ] Navigation between all screens works
   580â†’- [ ] Clear/reset on unmount works properly
   581â†’
   582â†’================================================================================
   583â†’REFERENCE: File Paths
   584â†’================================================================================
   585â†’
   586â†’## Files to CREATE:
   587â†’- src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts
   588â†’- src/services/hooks/useMarketplace.ts
   589â†’
   590â†’## Files to MODIFY:
   591â†’- src/services/models/products.model.ts (add FilterOption)
   592â†’- src/services/models/index.ts (export FilterOption)
   593â†’- src/services/hooks/index.ts (export new hooks)
   594â†’- src/screens/Points/index.tsx
   595â†’- src/screens/PointsDetail/index.tsx
   596â†’- src/screens/RewardProgramMarketplace/index.tsx
   597â†’- src/screens/InvoiceCashbackOnboarding/index.tsx
   598â†’- src/screens/InvoiceCashbackPoints/index.tsx
   599â†’- src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx
   600â†’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/index.ts
   601â†’- src/hooks/custom/useCardBuilderWhereUseMyPoints/data/index.ts
   602â†’- src/routes/Models/index.ts
   603â†’- src/screens/Points/Models/index.ts
   604â†’- src/atomic/organisms/FiltersBottomSheet/index.tsx (if needed)
   605â†’
   606â†’## Files to DELETE:
   607â†’- src/redux/ducks/points.ts
   608â†’- src/redux/ducks/rescue.ts
   609â†’- src/redux/ducks/getMarketplace.ts
   610â†’- src/redux/reducers/Models/index.ts
   611â†’- src/redux/reducers/index.ts
   612â†’- src/redux/sagas/points/models/index.ts
   613â†’- src/redux/ (entire folder)
   614â†’
   615â†’================================================================================
   616â†’NOTES
   617â†’================================================================================
   618â†’
   619â†’1. usePermission hook uses useSelector for SuperApp's customerReducer.nrc
   620â†’   - This is NOT local Redux - it's SuperApp's state
   621â†’   - Production (card-place) also uses this pattern
   622â†’   - Keep as-is until SuperApp migrates customer to Zustand
   623â†’
   624â†’2. getParameterPointsProgram() is called directly in some screens
   625â†’   - This is correct pattern - matches production
   626â†’   - Not everything needs to go through hooks
   627â†’
   628â†’3. RescuePayload type must be exported from services/models
   629â†’   - Check if it exists in rescue.model.ts
   630â†’   - If not, add it
   631â†’
   632â†’4. Screen Models/index.ts files may need updates
   633â†’   - Remove Redux type imports
   634â†’   - Add Zustand/services type imports
   635â†’
   636â†’================================================================================
   637â†’

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text: Let me also read the STYLE_GUIDE.md to ensure I follow the correct patterns.

content.content:
1â†’# Frontend Style Guide â€” Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2â†’
     3â†’Welcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4â†’This version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5â†’
     6â†’> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. âک•
     7â†’
     8â†’---
     9â†’
    10â†’## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11â†’- [Introduction](#introduction)
    12â†’- [Components & Screens â€” Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    13â†’- [Atomic Components â€” Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    14â†’- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    15â†’- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    16â†’- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    17â†’- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    18â†’- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    19â†’- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    20â†’- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    21â†’- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    22â†’- [Checklist](#checklist)
    23â†’
    24â†’---
    25â†’
    26â†’## Introduction
    27â†’
    28â†’The goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.  
    29â†’
    30â†’Key decisions:
    31â†’- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    32â†’- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    33â†’- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    34â†’- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    35â†’
    36â†’---
    37â†’
    38â†’## Components & Screens â€” Hook Component Pattern
    39â†’
    40â†’Each screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    41â†’
    42â†’```
    43â†’screens/Home/
    44â†’â”œâ”€â”€ index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    45â†’â”œâ”€â”€ view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    46â†’â””â”€â”€ Models/
    47â†’    â””â”€â”€ index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    48â†’```
    49â†’
    50â†’**Models/index.d.ts**
    51â†’```ts
    52â†’export interface HomeParams {
    53â†’  welcome?: string;
    54â†’}
    55â†’export interface HomeState {
    56â†’  greeting: string;
    57â†’  isLoading: boolean;
    58â†’}
    59â†’export interface HomeHandlers {
    60â†’  onPressCTA: () => void;
    61â†’}
    62â†’export type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    63â†’```
    64â†’
    65â†’**index.ts (logic hook)**
    66â†’```ts
    67â†’import { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from "react";
    68â†’import type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from "./Models";
    69â†’import { useUserStore } from "@/services/user/store"; // Zustand slice example
    70â†’
    71â†’export function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    72â†’  const name = useUserStore((s) => s.name);
    73â†’  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    74â†’
    75â†’  useEffect(() => {
    76â†’    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    77â†’    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    78â†’  }, []);
    79â†’
    80â†’  const greeting = useMemo(
    81â†’    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || "guest"}!`,
    82â†’    [params?.welcome, name]
    83â†’  );
    84â†’
    85â†’  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    86â†’    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    87â†’  }, []);
    88â†’
    89â†’  return { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA };
    90â†’}
    91â†’```
    92â†’
    93â†’**view.tsx (render)**
    94â†’```tsx
    95â†’import React from "react";
    96â†’import { View } from "react-native";
    97â†’import { Text, Button } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
    98â†’import { useHomeScreen } from "./index";
    99â†’import type { HomeParams } from "./Models";
   100â†’
   101â†’type Props = HomeParams;
   102â†’
   103â†’export default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   104â†’  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   105â†’
   106â†’  if (isLoading) {
   107â†’    return (
   108â†’      <View>
   109â†’        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   110â†’      </View>
   111â†’    );
   112â†’  }
   113â†’
   114â†’  return (
   115â†’    <View>
   116â†’      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   117â†’      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   118â†’    </View>
   119â†’  );
   120â†’}
   121â†’```
   122â†’
   123â†’---
   124â†’
   125â†’## Atomic Components â€” Hook Component Pattern
   126â†’
   127â†’```
   128â†’atomic/atoms/Button/
   129â†’â”œâ”€â”€ index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   130â†’â”œâ”€â”€ view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   131â†’â””â”€â”€ Models/
   132â†’    â””â”€â”€ index.d.ts
   133â†’```
   134â†’
   135â†’**Models/index.d.ts**
   136â†’```ts
   137â†’export interface ButtonProps {
   138â†’  text: string;
   139â†’  disabled?: boolean;
   140â†’  onPress?: () => void;
   141â†’}
   142â†’export interface ButtonState {
   143â†’  pressed: boolean;
   144â†’}
   145â†’export interface ButtonHandlers {
   146â†’  handlePress: () => void;
   147â†’}
   148â†’export type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   149â†’```
   150â†’
   151â†’**index.ts (logic hook)**
   152â†’```ts
   153â†’import { useCallback, useState } from "react";
   154â†’import type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from "./Models";
   155â†’
   156â†’export function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   157â†’  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   158â†’
   159â†’  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   160â†’    setPressed(true);
   161â†’    props.onPress?.();
   162â†’    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   163â†’  }, [props.onPress]);
   164â†’
   165â†’  return { pressed, handlePress };
   166â†’}
   167â†’```
   168â†’
   169â†’**view.tsx (render)**
   170â†’```tsx
   171â†’import React from "react";
   172â†’import { Pressable, View } from "react-native";
   173â†’import { Text } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
   174â†’import { useButton } from "./index";
   175â†’import type { ButtonProps } from "./Models";
   176â†’
   177â†’export default function Button(props: ButtonProps) {
   178â†’  const { pressed, handlePress } = useButton(props);
   179â†’
   180â†’  return (
   181â†’    <Pressable disabled={props.disabled} onPress={handlePress}>
   182â†’      <View>
   183â†’        <Text>{props.text}{pressed ? " â€¢" : ""}</Text>
   184â†’      </View>
   185â†’    </Pressable>
   186â†’  );
   187â†’}
   188â†’```
   189â†’
   190â†’---
   191â†’
   192â†’## Project Organization
   193â†’
   194â†’```
   195â†’src/
   196â†’â”œâ”€â”€ @types/            # Global TS types
   197â†’â”œâ”€â”€ assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   198â†’â”œâ”€â”€ atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   199â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ atoms/
   200â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ molecules/
   201â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ organisms/
   202â†’â”œâ”€â”€ modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   203â†’â”œâ”€â”€ screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   204â†’â”œâ”€â”€ services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   205â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   206â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ class/         # Class with logical requests
   207â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   208â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   209â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ services/      # Business orchestration
   210â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   211â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   212â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ models/        # Domain types & contracts
   213â†’â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ utils/         # Reusable service helps
   214â†’â”‚   â””â”€â”€ index.ts       # Public exports
   215â†’â”œâ”€â”€ hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   216â†’â”œâ”€â”€ routes/            # Navigation config
   217â†’â”œâ”€â”€ settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   218â†’â””â”€â”€ utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   219â†’```
   220â†’
   221â†’> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   222â†’
   223â†’---
   224â†’
   225â†’## Services Architecture
   226â†’
   227â†’**Flow:** `UI â†’ services â†’ repository â†’ api` and `UI â†’ services â†’ store (Zustand)`
   228â†’
   229â†’- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.  
   230â†’- **class/**: class with logical requests.  
   231â†’- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   232â†’- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.  
   233â†’- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.  
   234â†’- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.  
   235â†’- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).  
   236â†’- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.  
   237â†’- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   238â†’
   239â†’Principles:
   240â†’- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   241â†’- No circular dependencies.
   242â†’- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   243â†’
   244â†’---
   245â†’
   246â†’## State Management (Zustand-only)
   247â†’
   248â†’- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.  
   249â†’- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.  
   250â†’- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.  
   251â†’- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   252â†’
   253â†’**Slice example**
   254â†’```ts
   255â†’import type { StateCreator } from "zustand";
   256â†’import type { AuthActions, AuthState } from "../models/store";
   257â†’
   258â†’export type AuthSlice = {
   259â†’    auth: AuthState;
   260â†’    authActions: AuthActions
   261â†’};
   262â†’
   263â†’const initialAuth = {
   264â†’    user: null,
   265â†’    loading: false,
   266â†’    error: undefined,
   267â†’}
   268â†’
   269â†’export const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<AuthSlice, [], [], AuthSlice> = (set) => ({
   270â†’    auth: initialAuth,
   271â†’    authActions: {
   272â†’        setLoading: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, isLoading: v } })),
   273â†’        setUser: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, user: v } })),
   274â†’        setError: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, error: v } })),
   275â†’        reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   276â†’    }
   277â†’});
   278â†’```
   279â†’
   280â†’**Root Store**
   281â†’
   282â†’- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps â€” including SuperApp.
   283â†’
   284â†’```ts
   285â†’import { create } from "zustand";
   286â†’import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from "zustand/middleware";
   287â†’import { immer } from "zustand/middleware/immer";
   288â†’
   289â†’import { createUserSlice, type UserSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user";
   290â†’import { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-yourmf";
   291â†’
   292â†’import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   293â†’
   294â†’/** Add your slice Type */
   295â†’export type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   296â†’
   297â†’export const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   298â†’  devtools(
   299â†’    persist(
   300â†’      immer((...a) => ({
   301â†’        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   302â†’        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   303â†’      })),
   304â†’      {
   305â†’        name: "root-storage",
   306â†’        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   307â†’        partialize: (s) => ({
   308â†’          user: s.user,
   309â†’          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   310â†’        }),
   311â†’        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>) }),
   312â†’      }
   313â†’    ),
   314â†’    { name: "RootStore" }
   315â†’  )
   316â†’);
   317â†’```
   318â†’
   319â†’- For Use on Class.
   320â†’
   321â†’```ts
   322â†’class Auth {
   323â†’  private readonly setAuth;
   324â†’
   325â†’  constructor () {
   326â†’    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   327â†’  }
   328â†’
   329â†’  function doSomething(data) {
   330â†’    this.setUser({ ...data });
   331â†’  }
   332â†’}
   333â†’```
   334â†’
   335â†’- For Use on Component/Screen.
   336â†’- UI never imports the store directly â€” uses selectors
   337â†’
   338â†’```ts
   339â†’const loading = useRootStore((s) => s.user.isLoading);
   340â†’const token = useRootStore((s) => s.auth.token);
   341â†’```
   342â†’
   343â†’---
   344â†’
   345â†’## Routes Naming
   346â†’
   347â†’Standardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:  
   348â†’- âœ… `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)  
   349â†’- âœ… `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   350â†’
   351â†’---
   352â†’
   353â†’## Folder Naming Rules
   354â†’
   355â†’| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                    |
   356â†’|-------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------------|
   357â†’| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails`  |
   358â†’| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`    |
   359â†’
   360â†’---
   361â†’
   362â†’## Code Standards
   363â†’
   364â†’**Language**: English only.  
   365â†’**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   366â†’
   367â†’**Explanatory variables**  
   368â†’```js
   369â†’const onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   370â†’const getNumberValidation = (message) => (value) => !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   371â†’const isNumber = getNumberValidation("error message");
   372â†’isNumber(1);
   373â†’```
   374â†’
   375â†’**Semantic constants**  
   376â†’```js
   377â†’const DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   378â†’setTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   379â†’```
   380â†’
   381â†’**Library workarounds with link**  
   382â†’```js
   383â†’// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   384â†’// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   385â†’event.target.value = "";
   386â†’```
   387â†’
   388â†’**JSDoc**  
   389â†’```js
   390â†’/**
   391â†’ * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   392â†’ * @param {*} eventName
   393â†’ * @param {*} maxLength
   394â†’ */
   395â†’```
   396â†’
   397â†’**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**  
   398â†’```ts
   399â†’useEffect(() => {
   400â†’  (async () => {
   401â†’    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   402â†’    setSum(42);
   403â†’  })();
   404â†’}, [
   405â†’  setSum,
   406â†’]);
   407â†’```
   408â†’
   409â†’**Extract conditions**  
   410â†’```ts
   411â†’const hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   412â†’if (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   413â†’```
   414â†’
   415â†’**Optional chaining**  
   416â†’```ts
   417â†’const answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   418â†’```
   419â†’
   420â†’**JSX indentation**  
   421â†’```tsx
   422â†’{
   423â†’  !isEnd && (
   424â†’    <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />
   425â†’  )
   426â†’}
   427â†’```
   428â†’
   429â†’**Early returns**  
   430â†’```ts
   431â†’if (!data) return null;
   432â†’return <View />;
   433â†’```
   434â†’
   435â†’**Nullish coalescing**  
   436â†’```ts
   437â†’return data ?? 0;
   438â†’```
   439â†’---
   440â†’
   441â†’## Styles Patterns
   442â†’
   443â†’- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.  
   444â†’- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   445â†’
   446â†’---
   447â†’
   448â†’## Cache Pattern
   449â†’
   450â†’Keep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   451â†’
   452â†’```ts
   453â†’import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   454â†’
   455â†’export interface CachedData<T> {
   456â†’  timestamp: number;
   457â†’  data: T;
   458â†’}
   459â†’
   460â†’export interface StorageContract<T> {
   461â†’  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   462â†’  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   463â†’  remove(): Promise<void>;
   464â†’}
   465â†’
   466â†’export class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   467â†’  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   468â†’
   469â†’  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   470â†’    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   471â†’    if (!json) return null;
   472â†’    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   473â†’  }
   474â†’
   475â†’  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   476â†’    const payload: CachedData<T> = { timestamp: Date.now(), data };
   477â†’    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   478â†’  }
   479â†’
   480â†’  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   481â†’    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   482â†’  }
   483â†’}
   484â†’```
   485â†’
   486â†’**Guidelines**
   487â†’- One storage class per module/feature.
   488â†’- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   489â†’- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   490â†’- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   491â†’- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   492â†’
   493â†’---
   494â†’
   495â†’## Checklist
   496â†’
   497â†’- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   498â†’- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   499â†’- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   500â†’- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   501â†’- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   502â†’- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   503â†’- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   504â†’
   505â†’---
   506â†’
   507â†’Happy shipping! ًںڑ€
